c.d: Maximum number of contacts that can be included in a single broadcast message
c.s: App documentation, user manuals, platform specifications

c.d: Quality and comprehensiveness of tools for organizing, grouping, and managing contact lists for broadcasting
c.s: App store reviews, feature comparison sites, user testing

c.d: Percentage of broadcast messages successfully delivered to intended recipients
c.s: Performance analytics, user reports, reliability studies

c.d: Number of different operating systems and devices the app supports for seamless broadcasting
c.s: Official app stores, platform documentation, compatibility matrices

c.d: Strength of encryption and privacy features protecting broadcast messages and contact information
c.s: Security audits, privacy policy analysis, encryption standards documentation
